glosses.ja: もしかすると; ひょっとすると

translations.ro: S-ar putea să vin mai târziu.
translations.ja: 後で行くかもしれません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person singular, nominative); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 1st person singular); forms the predicate in verb-second position.
Modal adverb expressing possibility; modifies the verb phrase.
Temporal adverb indicating time; modifies the predicate.

sentences.target: Er ruft möglicherweise heute Abend noch an.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ʁuːft ˌmøːklɪçɐˈvaɪ̯zə ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈaːbənt nɔx an/

translations.de: Er ruft möglicherweise heute Abend noch an.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ʁuːft ˌmøːklɪçɐˈvaɪ̯zə ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈaːbənt nɔx an/
translations.en: He might call later this evening.
translations.es: Puede que llame más tarde esta noche.
translations.fr: Il pourrait appeler plus tard ce soir.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 늦게 전화할 수도 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他可能会在今晚晚些时候打电话。
translations.yue: 佢今晚遲啲可能會打嚟。
translations.ru: Он, возможно, позвонит сегодня поздно вечером.
translations.pt: Talvez ele ligue mais tarde hoje à noite.
translations.he: יכול להיות שהוא יתקשר מאוחר יותר הערב.
translations.vi: Anh ấy có thể gọi muộn tối nay.
translations.uk: Він, можливо, зателефонує сьогодні пізно ввечері.
translations.hu: Lehet, hogy ma este később felhív.
translations.hi: वह आज शाम बाद में फोन कर सकता है।
translations.el: Μπορεί να πάρει τηλέφωνο αργότερα απόψε.
translations.nb: Han ringer kanskje senere i kveld.
translations.id: Dia mungkin akan menelepon nanti malam.
translations.sv: Han kanske ringer senare i kväll.
translations.ro: S-ar putea să sune mai târziu diseară.
translations.da: Han ringer måske senere i aften.
translations.fi: Hän saattaa soittaa myöhemmin tänä iltana.
translations.ja: 彼は今夜遅くに電話するかもしれません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (3rd person singular, nominative); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd person singular) from the separable verb 'anrufen'; forms the predicate.
Modal adverb expressing possibility; modifies the verb phrase.
Temporal adverb; part of the time expression 'heute Abend' modifying the predicate.
Common noun; combines with 'heute' to form a temporal NP ('heute Abend').
Adverb indicating continuation/addition; modifies the predicate.
Separable verbal particle associated with 'anrufen'; placed at clause end by V2 word order.

translations.es: Puede que el tren se retrase.
translations.fr: Le train pourrait avoir du retard.
translations.it: Il treno potrebbe essere in ritardo.
translations.hi: ट्रेन देर से आ सकती है।
translations.ro: S-ar putea ca trenul să întârzie.
translations.ja: 電車が遅れるかもしれません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; determines the noun 'Bahn' (nominative singular).
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Lexical main verb (present, 3rd person singular); predicate meaning 'to have'.
Modal adverb expressing possibility; modifies the predicate.
Common noun; complement/object of 'haben' indicating the state possessed.

sentences.target: Wir finden das Restaurant möglicherweise ohne Navi nicht.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈfɪndən das ʁɛstoˈʁɑ̃ː ˌmøːklɪçɐˈvaɪ̯zə ˈoːnə ˈnaːvi nɪçt/

translations.de: Wir finden das Restaurant möglicherweise ohne Navi nicht.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈfɪndən das ʁɛstoˈʁɑ̃ː ˌmøːklɪçɐˈvaɪ̯zə ˈoːnə ˈnaːvi nɪçt/
translations.en: We might not find the restaurant without a GPS.
translations.es: Puede que no encontremos el restaurante sin GPS.
translations.fr: On pourrait ne pas trouver le restaurant sans GPS.
translations.it: Potremmo non trovare il ristorante senza GPS.
translations.ko: 내비 없이 식당을 못 찾을 수도 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 没有导航我们可能找不到那家餐厅。
translations.yue: 冇導航我哋可能搵唔到嗰間餐廳。
translations.ru: Без навигатора мы, возможно, не найдём этот ресторан.
translations.pt: Talvez a gente não encontre o restaurante sem GPS.
translations.he: בלי GPS אולי לא נמצא את המסעדה.
translations.vi: Không có GPS, chúng ta có thể không tìm được nhà hàng.
translations.ar: قد لا نعثر على المطعم بدون نظام تحديد المواقع.
translations.nl: Zonder gps vinden we het restaurant misschien niet.
translations.uk: Без GPS ми, можливо, не знайдемо цей ресторан.
translations.hu: Lehet, hogy GPS nélkül nem találjuk meg az éttermet.
translations.hi: GPS के बिना हम शायद रेस्तरां नहीं ढूँढ पाएँगे।
translations.pl: Bez GPS być może nie znajdziemy tej restauracji.
translations.el: Χωρίς GPS μπορεί να μην βρούμε το εστιατόριο.
translations.nb: Uten GPS finner vi kanskje ikke restauranten.
translations.id: Tanpa GPS, kita mungkin tidak menemukan restoran itu.
translations.sv: Utan GPS hittar vi kanske inte restaurangen.
translations.ro: Fără GPS s-ar putea să nu găsim restaurantul.
translations.cs: Bez navigace možná nenajdeme tu restauraci.
translations.da: Uden GPS finder vi måske ikke restauranten.
translations.fi: Ilman GPS:ää emme ehkä löydä ravintolaa.
translations.ja: ナビがないとそのレストランを見つけられないかもしれません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person plural, nominative); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 1st person plural); transitive predicate.
Definite article (neuter, accusative singular); determines the object noun 'Restaurant'.
Common noun; direct object of 'finden'.
Modal adverb expressing possibility; modifies the verb phrase.
Preposition heading the PP 'ohne Navi'; expresses lack of instrument/aid.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'ohne' within the PP.
Negation particle; negates the clause, with scope over the VP.
